content.json:
# 1PhoneMirror — Usage

Downloads via the `/dl` redirector, plus opt-in launch pings from the desktop app. All data is anonymous (no IP, no hostname).

Time range applies to every chart below.

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Download'
| summarize Downloads = count() by Version = tostring(customDimensions.version)
| order by Version desc
content.title: Downloads by version

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Download'
| summarize Downloads = count() by Client = tostring(customDimensions.client)
| order by Downloads desc
content.title: Downloads by client (winget vs browser)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Download'
| summarize Downloads = count() by bin(timestamp, 1d), Client = tostring(customDimensions.client)
| render timechart
content.title: Downloads over time

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Download'
| summarize Downloads = count() by Country = tostring(customDimensions.country)
| order by Downloads desc
| take 25
content.title: Downloads by country (top 25)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Launch'
| summarize ActiveInstalls = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.install_id)) by bin(timestamp, 1d)
| render timechart
content.title: Daily active installs (distinct install_id)

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Launch'
| summarize Installs = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.install_id)) by Version = tostring(customDimensions.version)
| order by Version desc
content.title: Active installs by app version

content.query:
customEvents
| where name == 'Launch'
| summarize Installs = dcount(tostring(customDimensions.install_id)) by OsBuild = tostring(customDimensions.os_build)
| order by Installs desc
| take 20
content.title: Active installs by Windows build
